title: Get Fable 5 output on a cheaper model
summary: A leaked Fable 5 system prompt can be injected into Claude Opus 4.8 to achieve near-identical output quality at a fraction of the cost. The approach requires only one line of code and is available on GitHub.
writeup: The video shows how a leaked Fable 5 system prompt can be injected into Claude Opus 4.8 to produce near-identical output at a fraction of the cost. The method takes one line of code and is published on GitHub. The takeaway: a system prompt alone can carry much of a higher-cost model's output quality onto a cheaper alternative.
